steps.action: Run the native engine test binary
steps.expected: Evaluation suite passes and covers material thresholds for pawn, piece, and queen advantage.
steps.observed: Runner reported PASS: 6 evaluation tests passed.

steps.expected: Starting and symmetrical positions evaluate within the contract zero window.

steps.action: Run the native engine test binary
steps.observed: Runner reported PASS: 6 evaluation tests passed.

steps.action: Map runner output to the covered native test
steps.expected: Checkmate returns an extreme mate score and stalemate returns 0.

steps.action: Run the native engine test binary
steps.expected: Engine API suite passes opening-book checks.
steps.observed: Runner reported PASS: 7 engine API tests passed.

steps.action: Map runner output to the covered native test
steps.expected: Book returns a legal move for the start position, after 1.e4, after 1.d4, and no move for an unknown position.
steps.observed: engine/tests/test_engine_api.c:test_opening_book_queries checks those four FEN cases and validates legality for each hit.

steps.action: Run the native engine test binary
steps.expected: Engine API suite passes draw-detection checks.
steps.observed: Runner reported PASS: 7 engine API tests passed.

steps.action: Map runner output to the covered native test
steps.expected: Threefold repetition, 50-move rule, insufficient material, and halfmove-clock resets are all exercised and search returns draw scores where required.
steps.observed: engine/tests/test_engine_api.c:test_draw_detection_and_search_integration covers repetition via an 8-ply cycle, 100-halfmove draw, KvK/KBvK/KNvK insufficiency, KBNvK non-draw, and reset-on-pawn/capture behavior.

steps.action: Run the native engine test binary
steps.expected: Engine API suite passes time-management checks.
steps.observed: Runner reported PASS: 7 engine API tests passed.

steps.action: Map runner output to the covered native tests
steps.expected: The engine budgets time, uses at least 20% of the allocation, returns a legal best move across 10 positions, and stops near the limit.
steps.observed: engine/tests/test_engine_api.c:test_time_management_budgeting validates fixed/sudden-death/increment allocations; test_search_respects_time_limits runs 10 positions at an 80ms limit and asserts elapsed_ms >= 16 and <= 250 with a legal best move.

evidence.notes: The runner does not print per-position timing lines on success; the assertion is satisfied via the passing native checks that enforce the timing bounds.

frictions.description: The native runner reports suite-level PASS lines, so mapping individual assertion IDs required inspecting the corresponding native test functions.
frictions.resolution: Reviewed engine/tests/test_evaluate.c and engine/tests/test_engine_api.c to map the assigned assertion IDs to their exact passing test coverage.

summary: Validated 6 assigned assertions through the native test-runner command. The binary exited 0 and all mapped evaluation and engine API suites passed, covering material, equal-position, terminal-score, opening-book, draw-detection, and time-management assertions.
